channel.title: Jesse Pekarek | Data Analytics
channel.description: Recent content on Jesse Pekarek | Data Analytics

item.title: About Me
item.description:
Hi, I’m Jesse 👋

I’m a data analyst candidate with 20+ years of experience across real estate, education technology, and nonprofit leadership — and I’m excited to bring all of it into my next chapter in Data Analytics.

My background is broad by design. I started with a deep passion for biochemistry and research, moved into instructional technology leadership, spent two decades in real estate and finance, and most recently founded a therapeutic equine sanctuary. Every role sharpened a different analytical muscle — whether that was writing SQL queries to build custom data exports, building Excel valuation tools used across 100+ client transactions, or translating complex market data into clear visual recommendations.

item.title: Experience
item.description:
If you are interested you can also visit my LinkedIn profile or view my resume below.

Director of Instructional Technology

Technical Service Center | Phoenix, AZ | July 2023 – Sept 2024

item.title: Portfolio
item.description:
SQL: High Demand Skills for Data Analysts

Tools: SQL, PostgreSQL, VS Code, Git & GitHub, DBeaver

Analyzed 700,000+ data job postings to identify top in-demand skills and salary trends using advanced SQL queries. Applied complex joins, CTEs, window functions, aggregations, and data validation to extract insights.

GitHub

Python: Data Analyst Skills & Salary Analysis

Tools: Python (pandas, matplotlib, seaborn), Git & GitHub, Jupyter, VS Code

Analyzed real-world data job postings to identify top in-demand skills and salary trends for data analyst roles. Applied data cleaning, transformation, and visualization end-to-end.
